description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display on the front, featuring a dark blue gradient background and several app icons along the bottom. The back is a deep blue color with a dual-lens camera module housed in a slightly raised, oval-shaped enclosure at the top left. The branding 'DIGITECH' is centered on the back, accompanied by smaller text below it. The sides are slim and metallic, with no visible buttons or ports, giving it a sleek and minimalist appearance. The phone's overall form is rectangular with rounded corners, and the surface finish appears smooth and slightly glossy. The device is typical of contemporary mobile phones, designed for handheld use and digital interaction.
description: A sleek, modern blue smartphone with a large touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and minimalistic design details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen display with app icons, weather widget, and notification bar.
description_view_1: Left edge view revealing the slim profile and absence of visible buttons or ports.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the dual-lens camera module, DIGITECH branding, and smooth blue finish.
description_view_3: Right edge view highlighting the thinness and clean, uninterrupted side surface.
attribute_brand_logo: DIGITECH logo centered on the back, white text with smaller subtext below.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a weather widget showing -2°C and cloudy in Saskatoon, a notification bar with time and icons, and a row of app icons (phone, messages, camera, gallery, and browser) at the bottom.
attribute_camera_placement: Dual camera module in an oval enclosure at the top left corner on the back, with two lenses and a flash.
